name: harrix-notes-explorer
description: Harrix Notes Explorer — custom notes panel for markdown notes

harrixNotesExplorer.cliExecutable.markdownDescription: Command or full path to `harrix-swiss-knife-cli`. Use an absolute path if the CLI is not on the PATH seen by VS Code (e.g. `.venv\\Scripts\\harrix-swiss-knife-cli.exe`).

harrixNotesExplorer.cliWorkingDirectory.markdownDescription: Working directory for `harrix-swiss-knife-cli` commands (project root that contains `config/config.json`). Set this if your VS Code workspace is NOT the harrix-swiss-knife repo root, otherwise templates and other config-dependent commands may not work.

harrixNotesExplorer.rememberFolderExpans.markdownDescription: Remember which folders were expanded or collapsed in **Harrix Notes** for this workspace (stored in workspace state). After reload or reopening VS Code, the tree restores those folders. Set to `false` to always start with every folder collapsed and not persist expansion.

harrixNotesExplorer.showNoteTitleFromCon.markdownDescription: In **Harrix Notes**, show the note title from YAML frontmatter (`title:`) or the first `#` heading. If neither is found, use the file name without extension (previous behavior). Set to `false` to always use the file name.

harrixNotesExplorer.showNoteFileNameBesi.markdownDescription: When the tree label is taken from YAML `title:` or a `#` heading and differs from the file name, show the file name (without extension) as a gray description next to the title. Set to `false` to show only the title. Requires `showNoteTitleFromContent`.

harrixNotesExplorer.openNotesInPreview.markdownDescription: When enabled, clicking a note in **Harrix Notes** opens the built-in **Markdown preview** (locked to that file) instead of the text editor, so each note can keep its own preview tab. The context menu on a note opens the opposite mode. When disabled, click opens the editor and the context menu opens preview. Requires the built-in Markdown extension.

harrixNotesExplorer.openInEditorSplit.markdownDescription: When enabled, **Open in Editor** opens the text editor with Markdown preview in a side-by-side split (editor left, preview right). When disabled, **Open in Editor** opens only the text editor.

harrixNotesExplorer.openInPreviewSplit.markdownDescription: When enabled, **Open in Preview** opens Markdown preview with the text editor in a side-by-side split (preview left, editor right). When disabled, **Open in Preview** opens only the preview.

harrixNotesExplorer.previewCopy.enabled.markdownDescription: Show **Copy** buttons on fenced code blocks in the built-in Markdown preview.

harrixNotesExplorer.previewCopy.showTopB.markdownDescription: Show the top-right copy button on code blocks.

harrixNotesExplorer.previewCopy.showBott.markdownDescription: Show the bottom-right copy button on multi-line code blocks (see `previewCopy.bottomHoverZonePx`).

harrixNotesExplorer.previewCopy.topAlway.markdownDescription: When `true`, the top copy button is always visible. When `false`, it appears only when the pointer is above the bottom hover zone.

harrixNotesExplorer.previewCopy.bottomHo.markdownDescription: Height in pixels from the bottom of a multi-line block where the bottom copy button appears on hover.

harrixNotesExplorer.previewCopy.backgrou.markdownDescription: Background color of copy buttons (e.g. `#fefefe` or `fefefe`).

harrixNotesExplorer.previewCopy.borderCo.markdownDescription: Border and icon color of copy buttons (e.g. `#7f7f7f`).

harrixNotesExplorer.previewCopy.copiedCo.markdownDescription: Border and icon color after a successful copy.

harrixNotesExplorer.previewFrontmatter.c.markdownDescription: Collapse the YAML **frontmatter** table at the top of the built-in Markdown preview into a `<details>` block (see `previewFrontmatter.summary`) instead of showing the full table at the top of the note.

harrixNotesExplorer.previewFrontmatter.s.markdownDescription: Label for the collapsed frontmatter `<summary>` in Markdown preview (e.g. `📋 YAML`, `⚙️ Metadata`, `🏷️ Meta`).

harrixNotesExplorer.assetFolderNames.markdownDescription: Folder names (case-insensitive) shown under a note when you use **Show attachments** in the context menu. Contents are listed recursively.

harrixNotesExplorer.noteDrop.moveIntoNam.markdownDescription: When dropping files onto a note, move `Note.md` into `Note/Note.md` if it is not already inside a folder with the same name (e.g. `Python/Python.md`).

harrixNotesExplorer.noteDrop.copyAllToNo.markdownDescription: When enabled, all dropped files are copied into the note folder root instead of `img`, `files`, or featured-image rules.

harrixNotesExplorer.noteDrop.imagesFolde.markdownDescription: Subfolder for dropped images and media (see `noteDrop.imageExtensions`). Created if missing.

harrixNotesExplorer.noteDrop.filesFolder.markdownDescription: Subfolder for other dropped files (not featured-image and not in `imageExtensions`). Created if missing.

harrixNotesExplorer.noteDrop.imageExtens.markdownDescription: File extensions (with leading dot) treated as images/media and copied into `noteDrop.imagesFolderName`.

colors.description: Optional accent for *.g.md merged/generated notes (use in workbench.colorCustomizations).

commands.title: Beautify Markdown and regenerate .g.md in folder

view/item/context.when: view == harrixNotesExplorer && (viewItem == notesFolderDiary || viewItem == notesFolderWithMergedDiary || viewItem == gitNotesFolderDiary || viewItem == gitNotesFolderWithMergedDiary)
view == harrixNotesExplorer && (viewItem == notesFolderDreams || viewItem == notesFolderWithMergedDreams || viewItem == gitNotesFolderDreams || viewItem == gitNotesFolderWithMergedDreams)
view == harrixNotesExplorer && (viewItem == notesFolderCases || viewItem == notesFolderWithMergedCases || viewItem == gitNotesFolderCases || viewItem == gitNotesFolderWithMergedCases)
view == harrixNotesExplorer && (viewItem == note || viewItem == noteHasAttachments || viewItem == noteWithAssets)
view == harrixNotesExplorer && (viewItem == note || viewItem == noteHasAttachments || viewItem == noteWithAssets)
view == harrixNotesExplorer && (viewItem == note || viewItem == noteHasAttachments || viewItem == noteWithAssets)

view == harrixNotesExplorer && (viewItem == note || viewItem == noteHasAttachments || viewItem == noteWithAssets || viewItem == gitNote || viewItem == gitNoteHasAttachments || viewItem == gitNoteWithAssets || viewItem == noteAssetFile || viewItem == noteAssetFolder || viewItem == notesFolder || viewItem == notesFolderWithMerged || viewItem == notesFolderDiary || viewItem == notesFolderWithMergedDiary || viewItem == notesFolderDreams || viewItem == notesFolderWithMergedDreams || viewItem == notesFolderCases || viewItem == notesFolderWithMergedCases || viewItem == notesFolderTemplateTarget || viewItem == notesFolderTemplateTargetWithMerged || viewItem == gitNotesFolder || viewItem == gitNotesFolderWithMerged || viewItem == gitNotesFolderDiary || viewItem == gitNotesFolderWithMergedDiary || viewItem == gitNotesFolderDreams || viewItem == gitNotesFolderWithMergedDreams || viewItem == gitNotesFolderCases || viewItem == gitNotesFolderWithMergedCases || viewItem == gitNotesFolderTemplateTarget || viewItem == gitNotesFolderTemplateTargetWithMerged)
view == harrixNotesExplorer && (viewItem == note || viewItem == noteHasAttachments || viewItem == noteWithAssets) && config.harrixNotesExplorer.openNotesInPreview
view == harrixNotesExplorer && (viewItem == note || viewItem == noteHasAttachments || viewItem == noteWithAssets) && !config.harrixNotesExplorer.openNotesInPreview
view == harrixNotesExplorer && (viewItem == gitNote || viewItem == gitNoteHasAttachments || viewItem == gitNoteWithAssets) && config.harrixNotesExplorer.openNotesInPreview
view == harrixNotesExplorer && (viewItem == gitNote || viewItem == gitNoteHasAttachments || viewItem == gitNoteWithAssets) && !config.harrixNotesExplorer.openNotesInPreview
view == harrixNotesExplorer && (viewItem == gitNote || viewItem == gitNoteHasAttachments || viewItem == gitNoteWithAssets)

view == harrixNotesExplorer && (viewItem == notesFolderWithMerged || viewItem == notesFolderWithMergedDiary || viewItem == notesFolderWithMergedDreams || viewItem == notesFolderWithMergedCases || viewItem == notesFolderTemplateTargetWithMerged || viewItem == gitNotesFolderWithMerged || viewItem == gitNotesFolderWithMergedDiary || viewItem == gitNotesFolderWithMergedDreams || viewItem == gitNotesFolderWithMergedCases || viewItem == gitNotesFolderTemplateTargetWithMerged)

view == harrixNotesExplorer && (viewItem == note || viewItem == noteHasAttachments || viewItem == noteWithAssets || viewItem == gitNote || viewItem == gitNoteHasAttachments || viewItem == gitNoteWithAssets) && config.harrixNotesExplorer.openNotesInPreview

view == harrixNotesExplorer && (viewItem == note || viewItem == noteHasAttachments || viewItem == noteWithAssets || viewItem == gitNote || viewItem == gitNoteHasAttachments || viewItem == gitNoteWithAssets) && !config.harrixNotesExplorer.openNotesInPreview

view == harrixNotesExplorer && (viewItem == notesFolderWithMerged || viewItem == notesFolderWithMergedDiary || viewItem == notesFolderWithMergedDreams || viewItem == notesFolderWithMergedCases || viewItem == notesFolderTemplateTargetWithMerged || viewItem == gitNotesFolderWithMerged || viewItem == gitNotesFolderWithMergedDiary || viewItem == gitNotesFolderWithMergedDreams || viewItem == gitNotesFolderWithMergedCases || viewItem == gitNotesFolderTemplateTargetWithMerged)
